name: Anhui Jianghuai Automobile Group Corp.,Ltd.
summary: Anhui Jianghuai Automobile Group Corp.,Ltd. manufactures and sells commercial vehicles and passenger cars in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company offers light, medium, and heavy-duty trucks; vans; sedans; IEVs; SUVs; MPVs; SRVs; pick-ups; bus chassis; engineering machinery; gearboxes; and engines, as well as electric vehicles. It exports its products to South America, Europe, Africa, Asia, and other regions. The company was formerly known as Anhui Jianghuai Automobile Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Anhui Jianghuai Automobile Group Corp.,Ltd. in November 2016. Anhui Jianghuai Automobile Group Corp.,Ltd. was founded in 1964 and is based in Hefei, the People's Republic of China.
